title: astragalus boelckei
intro: Astragalus boelckei is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to the Andes mountain range in South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to increase resistance to stress and infection. The health benefits of Astragalus boelckei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve overall well-being. Astragalus boelckei is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is typically used in traditional medicine to support the body's natural defenses and promote recovery from illness.
